overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a rain-soaked night exploration of a neon-lit waterfront district. The camera follows a character in a futuristic suit from a wooden dock through muddy wasteland beneath elevated highways, past holographic advertisements, and up to street level.

events.description: descending from wooden dock platform down ramp to muddy ground level
beginning forward movement through open muddy wasteland

agents.ego_description: character in white futuristic suit standing on dock then moving down wooden ramp into the muddy waterfront area

notable_agents.action: character in white suit with red gloves standing on the dock platform before moving out of frame

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with metal railings overlooking the water
towering futuristic skyscrapers with neon lights and holographic displays
derelict cars and trucks scattered in the muddy wasteland
massive concrete overpass structure with red hanging lanterns

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a wooden dock platform at night during a heavy rainstorm, with a character in a futuristic white suit standing before the neon-lit cyberpunk city skyline. The camera descends a wooden ramp into a muddy wasteland area, leaving the platform behind as it approaches the derelict vehicles scattered beneath the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded muddy wasteland under elevated highway

events.description: passing underneath the elevated highway overpass structure
approaching the large holographic Wet Dream billboard

agents.ego_description: walking through deep mud and puddles beneath the overpass, navigating around debris and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: traditional red paper lanterns hanging from the overpass structure
massive industrial tires scattered in the mud
massive rotating holographic advertisement displaying Wet Dream with crystalline graphics

segments.scene_description: Moving through the flooded wasteland beneath the elevated highway, the camera passes red lanterns hanging from the concrete structure and navigates around massive tire debris. The holographic Wet Dream billboard becomes visible in the distance on the left as the city skyline shifts to the left side of the frame.

events.description: circling around the large Wet Dream holographic billboard structure
moving from bright neon illumination into darker shadowed area near the stairs

agents.ego_description: circling the holographic billboard and observing neon reflections in the standing water

entered.detail: concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to street level

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the massive Wet Dream holographic billboard, passing close enough to see the crystalline graphics rotating above. Neon lights reflect vividly in the standing water covering the muddy ground. The concrete staircase leading back to street level becomes visible in the distance as the scene transitions from bright neon illumination to darker shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase leading to elevated cyberpunk street

events.description: approaching concrete staircase with burning barrel at the base
ascending stairs from muddy ground to elevated sidewalk

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs from the waterfront wasteland up to the street level

entered.detail: metal barrel with fire providing warm orange light at the base of the stairs
green metal safety railings along the staircase and sidewalk
bright cyan and pink neon signs for shops and bars at street level

segments.scene_description: Approaching the concrete staircase marked by a burning barrel casting warm orange light, the camera ascends from the muddy waterfront to the elevated street level. Green metal railings line the path as bright neon signs for cyberpunk shops and bars become visible at the top, marking the transition from the wasteland to the urban street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked wooden dock through a derelict wasteland and up into a neon-lit urban district. It begins on a platform overlooking a cyberpunk skyline before descending a wooden ramp into a muddy area filled with derelict vehicles beneath an elevated highway. As the camera navigates through flooded terrain and past hanging red lanterns, the view shifts toward a massive, rotating Wet Dream holographic billboard that casts vivid neon reflections across the standing water. The scene then transitions from the bright glow of the hologram into deeper shadows, moving toward a concrete staircase illuminated by the warm orange light of a burning barrel. Finally, the camera ascends past green metal railings, leaving the wasteland behind to emerge at street level amidst the glowing signs of futuristic shops and bars.
